content.en:
Territory of the Dark Mist.

This is the Dark Mist Lord's Eternal Space-Time Territory, and it is one of the top Eternal Space-Time Territories, there are many Eternal Realm Lords and countless half-step Eternal Realms, and it is also considered by other Eternal Realms to be one of the safest places in space-time territories.

After all, with the Lord of the Dark Mist, one of the six legendary lords, in charge, who would dare to invade here?

Even in the two wars between the space-time territory and the Void Beast, the Dark Mist Territory was not affected.

But today, the Darkfog Territory has been invaded.

Bang!!!!

The space-time barrier of the Darkmist Territory was torn apart, and a Will Slashing Void Sword composed of will and innate eternal rules came across the void and bombarded the core area of the Darkfog Territory, which was also the headquarters of the Darkfog Territory and the cultivation place of the Darkfog Lord.

The Darkmist Lord's body is not guarding in the Darkfog Territory, but is actually still cultivating in a ruin. "Zero Ninety-Seven"

And his two clones had already gone to the Source Sea, causing the Dark Mist Territory to be unable to stop Ye Tian at all.

Click!

In the Dark Mist Territory, the sacred mountain cultivated by the Dark Mist Lord was shattered by a single blow, and a Dark Mist Lord's command around him was subjected to the erosion of the Will Slashing Void Sword.

One after another will swords slashed through the bodies of the half-step Eternal Realm, even the Seven-Pole Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm or the Eight-Pole Realm and the Half-step Eternal Realm could not withstand any wisp of the will sword, and they turned into smashes one by one.

"No!"

A Peak Lord of the Immortal Realm looked desperate and tried his best to resist this Dao Will Sword, which was only the aftermath of the attack of the Will Slashing Void Sword, but he still couldn't withstand it.

I saw that the body of this peak lord of the Immortal Realm was smashed into countless pieces by the sword of will, and all his vitality dissipated.

Not only this peak lord of the Immortal Realm, but also many Immortal Realm Lords also fell and died one after another.

Maybe they have a clone, but what stays here must be the ontology, because in their eyes, the Darkfog Territory is the safest place, and the Darkfog Territory will naturally not fall if it stays here, but who would have thought that the Darkfog Territory would be invaded?

These Immortal Realm Lords couldn't withstand Ye Tian's Will Sword, but there were still two Immortal Realm Lords under the command of the Dark Mist Lord.

These two Immortal Realm Lords are lords cultivated by the Dark Mist Lord, so the main body is also cultivating in the Dark Mist Territory.

At this moment, they also withstood the attack of the Will Slashing Void Sword.

The two-step Immortal Realm Lord was directly severely injured and dying, while the seven-step Immortal Realm Lord was not lightly injured.

However, Ye Tian's attack just now was not aimed at them, if it was aimed at them, they would not be able to withstand it.

"Notify Lord of the Mist!"

The two Immortal Realm Lords immediately summoned the Darkmist Lords.

Immediately, they tried to persuade Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, you invaded the Darkfog Territory, aren't you afraid of the wrath of the Darkfog Lord? Leave immediately, there is still a chance to live. The two-step immortal lord persuaded

And take a step!

Ye Tian walked in front of the two-step Immortal Realm Lord in one step, and his will was extremely fisted.

Rumble!

That two-step Immortal Realm Lord was directly blasted by a punch, and the Will Extreme Dao Fist was a Will Legendary Eternal Technique, and this Two-Step Immortal Realm Lord didn't know the Will Defense Eternal Technique at all, plus the will was not very strong, and the will was directly annihilated by Ye Tian.

At this point, this second-step immortal realm lord has fallen.

It's really no legend.

In the space-time projection palace where the breath of the sword is comprehended.

An Immortal Realm Lord and a Legendary Lord, Lord Binghan, were cultivating and comprehending the aura of kendo here.

Suddenly, the body of an Immortal Realm Lord disintegrated and dissipated between heaven and earth.

Such a scene immediately attracted the attention of other Immortal Realm territories, and even the Lord of Ice Han looked at it.

"Why did Lord Yuzawa's body suddenly disintegrate?"

"This is Lord Yuzawa's doppelganger, it should be Lord Yuze himself who has broken down his own doppelganger, right?"

"Dismantling your own body? How is this possible. The cost of recondensing a doppelganger is extremely huge, how could Lord Yuzawa be so stupid and dismantle his own body by himself?

"Lord Yuze is the lord under the command of the Lord of the Dark Mist, and his body should be in the Dark Mist Territory, is it possible that the Lord of Yuze can still fall?"

"I've received a message that the Darkfog Territory has been invaded. "

"Who invaded the Darkmist Territory, the Void Beast?"

"It's not the Void Beast, it's the Endless Lord!

"What, it's the Endless Lord, how dare he invade the Dark Mist Territory, the Endless Lord is only an Immortal Realm Lord, he is not afraid that the Dark Mist Lord will kill him?"

"Let's go, let's take a look, something big must have happened!"

Whoa!!!

An Immortal Realm Lord went to see the excitement, and a clone of the Ice Han Lord also went to the Dark Mist Territory, and she was also very curious about it........ ，

......

Territory of the Dark Mist.

The seven-step immortal realm lord was already seriously injured and dying at this moment, he wanted to escape, but he couldn't escape at all, the difference in strength between the two sides was too great.

"Billion Voids!"

Ye Tian performed this trick.

Rumble!

A heavy void compressed, and the seven-step immortal realm lord turned into a billion-foot body, thus resisting the suppression of this billion-weight void, but it was crushed in an instant, and even the billion-weight void turned into countless fragments.

The Lord of the Seven-Step Immortal Realm also fell.

And all this happened in a short period of time, so fast that even the Darkmist Lord didn't have time to rescue.

This seven-step immortal realm lord had just fallen, and the Darkmist Lord's body had been driven back from a certain ruin.

"Endless Lord, you're going too far!!!"

The Lord of the Mist said angrily.

"I have never provoked you, but you want to kill me, and you want to attack my dark forbidden realm, since you dare to do this, you have to bear my wrath!" Ye Tian said coldly.

Without saying a word, the two fought on the spot in the void area.

Thundered!!!!!

The fluctuations caused by the battle between the two even had an impact on the Dark Mist Territory, and the Dark Mist Lord tried to stay away from the Dark Mist Territory and lead Ye Tian to fight farther away, Ye Tian didn't care about it.

0.9 His purpose is not to destroy the Darkfog Territory, now that he has killed a lot of Eternal Realms of the Darkfog Territory, it is enough, and he even wants to kill the Darkfog Lord a little now

Of course, he knows it's hard to do, but he can give it a try.

Ye Tian came here with two replica bodies, two against one, and had a slight advantage.

It's a pity that there is only one Hybrid Elemental Order, and it can't be equipped on a replica body.

What Ye Tian wants to do now is to kill one of the clones of the Darkmist Lord first, and then he can use his free hands to deal with the main body of the Darkfog Territory and another clone.

Soon.

Ye Tian's body also dispatched, and in the source sea, he united two clones with the two replica bodies to attack the Dark Mist Lord.

This is three to one, and there is also the assistance of the Mixed Yuan Order, which completely crushed the clone of the Darkmist Lord. _
